description: Add sendNotification() calls to all approval actions and data submissions that currently lack them.
steps: Step 1 - Add notification to approveCuti(id, status) in modules-kehadiran.js: Notify employee about cuti approval/rejection.
Step 2 - Add notification to simpanOvertime() in modules-kehadiran.js: Notify HR about new overtime request.
Step 3 - Add notification to approveOT(id, status) in modules-kehadiran.js: Notify employee about overtime approval/rejection.
Step 4 - Add notification to simpanReimburse() in modules-penggajian.js: Notify admin about new reimbursement request.
Step 5 - Add notification to approveReimb(id, status) in modules-penggajian.js: Notify employee about reimbursement approval/rejection.
Step 6 - Add notification to simpanKasbon() in modules-penggajian.js: Notify admin about new kasbon request.
Step 7 - Add notification to approveKasbon(id, status) in modules-penggajian.js: Notify employee about kasbon approval/rejection.
Step 8 - Add notification to approveDinas(id, status) in absensi-ijef.js: Notify employee about dinas luar approval/rejection.
acceptance_criteria: approveCuti sends notification to employee with approval/rejection status
simpanOvertime sends notification to HR about new overtime request
approveOT sends notification to employee with approval/rejection status
simpanReimburse sends notification to admin about new reimbursement
approveReimb sends notification to employee with approval/rejection status
simpanKasbon sends notification to admin about new kasbon request
approveKasbon sends notification to employee with approval/rejection status
approveDinas sends notification to employee with approval/rejection status
All JS files pass syntax check
findings: All 8 notification calls added successfully. Used consistent emoji patterns (checkmark for approved, X for rejected, clipboard for new submissions). Kasbon uses 'aktif' status instead of 'approved' for approval.
